files.00_Overview.md: Good structure with learning path and concept checks. Needs: consolidate redundant OpenFOAM context blocks (3 large blocks repeat similar solver/BC info), add missing Learning Objectives section at top, streamline the tip boxes - they're too long and redundant with each other.
files.01_Flow_Regimes.md: Comprehensive but excessive OpenFOAM context blocks (6+ large blocks). Needs: reduce context redundancy by 40%, consolidate flow regime tables, move code examples to dedicated code section, add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. The file is 394 lines - consider splitting into two files.
files.02_Interfacial_Phenomena.md: Missing standard 3W structure. Needs: add Learning Objectives section at beginning, expand 'Why' section (currently jumps straight to definitions), add Key Takeaways at end, include more OpenFOAM-specific context (currently has minimal), add practical examples section.
files.02_VOF_METHOD/00_Overview.md: Strong 3W framework application. Needs: reduce redundant OpenFOAM context explanations (repeats file paths 5+ times), streamline workflow diagram (too complex), consolidate applications table, add missing Key Takeaways section.
files.02_VOF_METHOD/01_The_VOF_Concept.md: Excellent analogies (Raster vs Vector). Needs: add Learning Objectives at top, reduce excessive OpenFOAM file path annotations (appears 6+ times), add practical exercise section, consolidate comparison table into separate reference file.
files.02_VOF_METHOD/02_Interface_Compression.m: Technical depth is excellent. Needs: add Learning Objectives section, reduce redundant MULES explanations (appears in 3 places), add troubleshooting quick-reference table, streamline code examples, add Key Takeaways summarizing cAlpha values.
files.02_VOF_METHOD/03_Setting_Up_InterFoam.md: Very practical but structure needs work. Needs: reorganize into clear step-by-step workflow with numbered checkpoints, add pre-flight checklist at start, consolidate BC combo table into reference section, add common pitfalls table, add Learning Objectives.
Good content but repetitive. Needs: add Learning Objectives, eliminate redundant Courant number explanations (appears 4 times), consolidate maxCo vs maxAlphaCo comparison into single clear table, add decision tree for time step settings, streamline troubleshooting section.

global_strategy: These files form a VOF learning sequence with strong technical content but structural inconsistencies. Phase 1: Standardize all files with Learning Objectives at top and Key Takeaways at end. Phase 2: Reduce OpenFOAM context redundancy by 35-40% - create shared reference blocks instead of repeating file paths/keywords in every file. Phase 3: Consider splitting 01_Flow_Regimes.md (394 lines) into 'Flow_Regime_Classification.md' and 'Flow_Regime_In_OpenFOAM.md'. Phase 4: Extract all code examples and BC tables into a centralized reference file (e.g., 'VOF_Quick_Reference.md') to reduce duplication across the 5 VOF files. Phase 5: Add consistent 'Prerequisites' and 'Next Steps' navigation to all files.
